sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42054" key="e)pwdi/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπωδίνω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <sense id="n42054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffer birth-pangs,</tr_> metaph., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπωδίνουσι μέριμναι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archyt.</author> </bibl> </cit> Amph.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0620.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
